wheat-flour.name: Wheat Flour
wheat-flour.description: Finely milled wheat flour perfect for chapatis, rotis, and baked goods.

rice-flour.name: Rice Flour
rice-flour.description: Smooth and fine rice flour ideal for idlis, dosas, and traditional sweets.

puttu-flour.name: Puttu Flour
puttu-flour.description: Special blend for soft, fluffy puttu — a traditional Kerala breakfast staple.

kashmiri-chilly.name: Kashmiri Chilly Powder
kashmiri-chilly.description: Vibrant red powder that adds beautiful color and mild heat to dishes.

spicy-chilly.name: Spicy Chilly Powder
spicy-chilly.description: Hot and aromatic chilly powder for a fiery kick in curries and dishes.

turmeric.name: Turmeric Powder
turmeric.description: Bright golden turmeric with earthy flavor and powerful health benefits.

coriander.name: Coriander Powder
coriander.description: Aromatic coriander that adds a warm, nutty flavor to your dishes.

jeera.name: Jeera Powder
jeera.description: Freshly ground cumin with an intense, warm aroma for your recipes.

pepper.name: Pepper Powder
pepper.description: Pungent black pepper powder that adds a spicy kick to any dish.

badi-saunf.name: Badi Saunf
badi-saunf.description: Premium quality fennel seeds with a sweet, anise-like flavor.

garam-masala.name: Garam Masala
garam-masala.description: A rich blend of ground spices to add warmth and depth to Indian cuisine.

coconut-oil.name: Coconut Oil
coconut-oil.description: Pure, cold-pressed coconut oil with a rich aroma and health benefits.

coconut-paste.name: Coconut Paste
coconut-paste.description: Smooth, creamy coconut paste perfect for curries and traditional dishes.
